title: Altered Immunocompetence | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
ended for all persons birth through 59 years of age. Hepatitis B vaccine is also recommended for patients with chronic renal disease in all age groups (including 60 years old and older) based on the risk from dialysis-based bloodborne transmission.
